tool_type._: //TODO change to lensmill to conform to the customer's reqd DOC/WOC
tool_type.name: Solid Lens End Mill
HP/Roughing End Mill
tool_type.usage:
High Performance/Roughing Endmill requires rigid setup and machine
Make sure your clamping and tool holding are adequate

tool_type.name: Spot Drill
tool_type.usage: Spotting drills are used to start and locate holes. They create a shallow hole that helps prevent drill bits from deviating from center, when starting to drill.

tool_type.name: Indexed Drill
tool_type.usage:
Assumed 1 effective flute (2 staggered inserts)
Coolant-Through is highly recommended

tool_coating.name: TiN
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Copper Alloys, Bronze Alloys, Titanium Super Alloys, Hard Non-metals

tool_coating.name: TiCN
tool_coating.application: Used on ferrous, non-ferrous and non-magnetic stainless steel. Good abrasion resistance, low heat resistance.
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Copper Alloys, Bronze Alloys, Titanium Super Alloys, Hard Non-metals

tool_coating.name: TiAlN
tool_coating.application:
Nickel Alloys, Stainless Steel, Hardened Steels, Tool Steels, Cast Iron
One of the most versatile coatings. It may be run dry or with minimum quantity lubrication
applications, where heat can be a problem. Coolant should be used when chip welding or galling can occur.
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Copper Alloys, Bronze Alloys, Titanium and Nickel Super Alloys, Hard Non-metals

tool_coating.name: AlTiN
tool_coating.application:
Nickel Alloys, Stainless Steel, Hardened Steels, Tool Steels, Cast Iron
One of the most versatile coatings. It may be run dry or with minimum quantity lubrication
applications, where heat can be a problem. Coolant should be used when chip welding or galling can occur.
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Copper Alloys, Bronze Alloys, Titanium and Nickel Super Alloys, Hard Non-metals

tool_coating.name: AlCrN
tool_coating.application:
Nickel Alloys, Stainless Steel, Hardened Steels, Tool Steels, Cast Iron
One of the most versatile coatings. It may be run dry or with minimum quantity lubrication
applications, where heat can be a problem. Coolant should be used when chip welding or galling can occur.
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Copper Alloys, Bronze Alloys, Titanium and Nickel Super Alloys, Hard Non-metals

tool_coating.name: ZrN (Zirconium Nitride)
tool_coating.application: Mostly used on Aluminium, Copper and Bronze alloys including on high-silicon Aluminium alloys. Can also be used on Cast Iron, Stainless Steels and Titanium
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Stainless Steels, Aluminium Alloys, Copper Alloys, Titanium Alloys, Hard and Soft Non-Metals

tool_coating.name: nACRo  (nc-AlCrN/a-Si^3N^4)
tool_coating.application: For high heat applications, better resistance to shock and chipping than nACo, for roughing applications
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Titanium and Nickel Super Alloys

tool_coating.name: nACo (nc-AlTiN)/(a-Si^3N^4)
tool_coating.application: High performance in super alloys, hard machining, high heat applications. Requires rigid setup
tool_coating.material_groups_text: Mild to Hardened Steels, Cast Iron, Stainless Steels, Titanium and Nickel Super Alloys

material.name: High-carbon and Alloy steels. Medium-Hard (160 - 300 HB)
Normal tool steels.Hard-quenching and tempering steels. (170-270 HB)
High-strength, Hardened Tool and HSS steels. (>360 HB)
Difficult and Very Difficult stainless steels. (150-500 HB)

Titanium Alpha Alloys and Alpha-Beta Alloys (300-400HB)
